notes: Tuition fees are subject to change at any time without prior notice.
The new tuition fees apply to all continuing and new students enrolled in postgraduate programs.
Rows with multiple published routes or credit bands are represented as tuition variants.
Out-of-scope degree families are retained in out_of_scope_programs.json and excluded from the main mapping total.
